description: Tier 2 — call-extraction field accuracy. Hand-labeled ground truth (from the diarized transcript text) for a sample of the messy calls. The harness compares the committed extractions in data/transcripts.json against these labels and reports per-field accuracy. Deterministic by default (grades the stored extraction, no API key); pass --live to re-run the LLM extractor. Field comparisons are normalization-aware: MC numbers compare on digits, company names on fuzzy similarity, equipment on token containment.

cases.note: Spoken-out carrier name ('s m r'), rate negotiation.
Self-corrected MC (777->776). Load id spoken in words = 29372343; the extractor garbles it to a 9-digit number — this case is expected to FAIL load_reference, which is the point.
Self-corrected MC (712143->712843). Spoken load id = 29372312; extractor garbles it. Expected to FAIL load_reference.
MC read with a docket suffix; no load number, lane + equipment only.
Compliance call — must NOT fabricate a load or rate (all null).
MC read with dashes (11-98-74-3); mis-transcribed company ('Estate' for State).
Hyphenated spoken MC (665-432). Question call, no rate offered (carrier_rate null).
Voicemail, clean: dashed MC (45-67-89), both rates present.
